metadata.title: Planning | AdonERP
metadata.description: AI-powered workforce planning platform for all your scheduling operations — from shift management and resource allocation to conflict avoidance and pivot table analysis.

hero.title: Smart planning.
hero.description: Adon Planning optimizes scheduling through automation. Schedule shifts and resources, manage onsite work, and enjoy the simplicity of integrated timesheets and invoices.

schedulingSection.title: Step up
schedulingSection.description: Visualize and optimize your schedule. Gain clarity and efficiency with a stunning Gantt chart tool, templates, auto-planning, and recurrent tasks simplify your agenda management.
schedulingSection.floatingNote: We cannot wait for you to use this

coverShiftSection.title: Cover
coverShiftSection.description: Control your planning. Create shifts and reassign them effortlessly using a user-friendly drag-and-drop interface. With collaboration options, allow everyone on the team to see open shifts and switch them among one another.

demo.message: This shift needs to be covered by another team member.

features.title: Open shifts
features.description: Leave shifts unassigned and assign them with a simple drag and drop.

features.title: Schedule
features.description: Manage all shifts by organizing them by role, employee, or project.

features.title: Avoid conflicts
features.description: Get a warning if multiple shifts are scheduled simultaneously for an employee.

features.title: Pivot table analysis
features.description: Create advanced pivot tables and export the data in .xls files.

ctaBanner.title: Join 15 million users
ctaBanner.description: who grow their business with Adon

testimonial.quote: Adon improved resource management, making planning and invoicing more efficient, enhancing communication and collaboration.
testimonial.name: Cédric Lesaux
